programme.title: The Recall
programme.desc: The great Wesley Snipes (Blade himself!) stars as "The Hunter" in this Mauro Borrelli (The Ghostmaker) directed film. The Recall also stars RJ Mitte (Breaking Bad), Jedidiah Goodacre (Descendants), Niko Pepaj (Awkward), Laura Maria Bilgeri (Toby Goes to Camp) and Hannah Rose May (Ballers). The movie tells the tale of five friends vacationing at a remote lake house, expecting nothing less than a good time. Unbeknownst to them, Earth is under an alien invasion and in the thralls of a mass-abduction. Director Borelli is a former collaborator of director Tim Burton and the film illustrator for blockbuster films such as Pirates of the Caribbean and Captain America. The Recall will also be shot for the new Barco Escape three-screen, panoramic theatrical format, which fully surrounds audiences and offers the ultimate immersive cinema experience. Portions of the films will also be shot in Virtual Reality.

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: Max Richards, a teenage boy born with a medical condition of being lethally attractive, who is changed forever when he meets Alex, a girl with her own bizarre ailment, who aids him on his quest of self-discovery... without accidentally killing someone.

programme.title: Cleanskin
programme.desc: Harry (Sam Douglas), a British people arms dealer, is seen in bed with a prostitute named Rena (Shivani Ghai). While toying with Harry's pistol, she unloads it but replaces the empty magazine. Harry's bodyguard Ewan (Sean Bean) is a British Secret Intelligence Service. Harry and Ewan travel to a bank, transporting a briefcase of Semtex. The men are followed by two terrorists, Ash (Abhin Galeya) and Ibrahim (Mens-Sana Tamakloe). Ibrahim approaches Harry and Ewan from the top of a staircase, shooting at them. After Ash shoots Ewan twice, Harry tries to shoot Ash, only to discover there are no bullets in his gun. Ash kills Harry and takes the briefcase of Semtex. However, Ewan manages to shoot Ash in the arm; but, before he can apprehend him, Ash returns fire and escapes with the briefcase.

programme.title: Hangman
programme.desc: Mystery movie. American mystery, produced in 2017. Retired homicide detective Ray Archer and his partner, ex FBI agent Will Ruiney, are assigned to track down a vicious serial killer, who is playing a twisted version of the children's game 'Hangman'.

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman
programme.desc: Rosie (Michelle Pfeiffer), is a 40-year-old divorced mother who works as a scriptwriter and producer for a TV show ''You Go Girl''. Rosie is insecure about her age, and uses cosmetics to maintain her appearance. She has a very close relationship with her thirteen-year-old daughter, Izzie (Saoirse Ronan), which becomes even closer when she learns that she has fallen for a boy in her class named Dylan (Rory Copus).

programme.title: Digging Into China
programme.desc: Harriet, a ten-year old girl, lives together with her big sister and her alcoholic mother out in the countryside. The family runs a motel. Harriet is different from the others, as she owns a great creativity and has nobody to play with. Her infinite world exists only in her mind. One day, Ricky comes along. He is a grown-up, but retarded son of an elderly lady. Soon, Harriet and Ricky share their experiences of life from a different point of view and become close friends. But his mother still plans to give Ricky away into professional care in a home, because she won't live forever to be there for him.

programme.title: McCinsey's Island
programme.desc: A former secret agent finds a treasure map and decides to find the loot. But he is not the only one.

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: In December 1941, Japan expands the occupation of its neighbouring countries to Southeast Asia. The railway from Tianjin to Nanjing in East China became a key military transportation route, heavily guarded by Japanese soldiers. Railroad worker Ma Yuan (Jackie Chan) leads a team of freedom fighters. Using his deep knowledge of the train network, he and his men sabotage it, ambushing Japanese soldiers and stealing supplies to feed the starving Chinese. Although the freedom fighters have no weapons of their own, they employ whatever tools are at hand, including a hammer and shovels, loose railway track planks and diverted trains. The local Chinese call the unlikely heroes the "Railroad Tigers". The freedom fighters find themselves on the wrong side of the tracks when the Japanese send reinforcements to Shandong. In an act of defiance, Ma Yuan launches his most dangerous mission yet, blowing up a heavily guarded railroad bridge. When the Japanese learn of the crippling plan, which will derail the war effort, the stakes are raised even higher. After many missed opportunities and missed shots, the bridge is blown up by the ragtag Chinese railroad tigers.

programme.title: Talea
programme.desc: Summertime. Everybody is excited to go on vacation to Italy. Everybody but Jasmin. Jasmin is yearning something. She wants to be with Eva, her mother, from whom she had to live seperately for a long time. For weeks, Jasmin is trying to get close to Eva. She does not give up, even if she's rejected. After an argument, Jasmin runs away from her fosterhome and convinces Eva to leave the city together and go on a trip. The two get closer -- sometimes as friends, sometimes as mother and daughter. A first joint cigarette, a dance in the village disco, wanderings through the woods. But expectations and needs of the girl and her mother are diverging repeatedly, especially when a man attracts Eva's attention and disturbs the growing closeness between mother and daughter.

programme.title: Almost Friends
programme.desc: Charlie, a culinary genius, has lost the motivation. He doesn't know what to with his life anymore, but he knows one thing - get close to Amber. In comparison to her boyfriend, he seems to be totally unattractive, but Charlie's closest friend convinces him that where there's a will there's a way.

programme.title: 10 Things We Should Do Before We Break Up
programme.desc: Abigail, a self-sufficient single mom meets Ben. They both think every great relationship ends in disaster. On the first date they come up with 10 things to do together before they break up. But the estimated end is not so sure - because fate adds #11 to their list.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Orson, a compulsive bureaucrat who discovers a secret room.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: A space cruiser crash lands on the purple planet of Heinous, an intergalactic prison that is home to the most vile and dangerous villains in the galaxy. All of the crew have perished except for its pilot; intergalactic space hero Max Cloud, the ships hapless chef Jake, and its reluctant Commander, Rexy. Their mission is simple, wait inside their vessel until help arrives and try their best to keep the prisoners outside from getting in, however this is Max Cloud and he doesn't do simple. ...But this is not real life. This is a video-game, and at the helm of the adventure is Sarah, a teenage video game fanatic who immerses herself in fantasy to avoid dealing with her less than packed social life and a strained relationship with her dad, straight laced single parent Tony. After a fallout, Tony bans Sarah from playing games and in a frenzy of teenage emotion Sarah makes a wish, that in the blink of an eye becomes a reality... With a flash of pixelated light Sarah is transported into the video game by the mysterious Space Witch, who exists in an etherial void, behind a secret door, that never appears in the same place twice! So Sarah finds herself trapped inside the game and the only person who can help her is her equally socially defunct but incredibly charming friend, Cowboy, who must control Sarah from her bedroom in Brooklyn and keep her from losing her one life, in a game that can't be paused, that they have never finished before! To make matters worse Sarah has not found herself inside the body of the wonderful Max Cloud, but Jake, that's right... the hapless chef. We follow Sarah as she negotiates the terrifying and dangerous planet of Heinous alongside the ever confident Max and fed up Rexy, jumping back and forth with the real world as the pressure mounts on Cowboy and the real stakes start to rise. They soon encounter stranded Bounty Hunter, Brock Donnelly, and realise they must get off the planet before help arrives as the planets surface burns so hot every day that anything not underground is space liquid! AND to add to the stakes Cowboy must keep his best friend away from the evil clutches of the games villain Revengor, a part man, part machine, lunatic who is hell bent on taking Max Clouds ship and with an army of prisoners and an evil sorcersss called SHEE, his chances look pretty damn good. The action bounces between the video game and the real world as Cowboy and Sarah must come together to get her home, all leading to the ultimate showdown in Revengors lair, where back in Brooklyn, video game expertise arrives in the form of a very unlikely hero. Sit down. Plug in. It's time to play THE INTERGALACTIC ADVENTURES OF MAX CLOUD.

programme.title: American Traitor
programme.desc: Based on a true story. Eccentric, brilliant lawyer James Laughlin (Al Pacino) boldly accepts the case to defend American entertainer Mildred Gillars (Meadow Williams) from ten counts of treason charged by the US government regardless of the inevitable backlash from his country. During WWII, Mildred became a powerful weapon in the hands of the Nazis and was forced to sing defeatist war propaganda to US soldiers based in Europe. Terrorized and raped by Joseph Goebbels, Hitler's right-hand man, Mildred broadcasts hate-filled messages in order to survive the dark and dangerous world of the Third Reich. Despite attempting to murder Goebbels, Mildred is eventually captured by American authorities and sent to trial where, against all odds, Laughlin struggles to redeem her reputation and maintain his own.

programme.title: The Good Girl
programme.desc: A discount store clerk strikes up an affair with a stock boy who considers himself the incarnation of Holden Caulfield.Justine is a sullen 30-year-old woman stuck in a dead-end job at the Retail Rodeo department store.In addition to her mind-numbing occupation, Justine also has to contend with her dim-witted husband, Phil, and his partner, Bubba, who work as house painters when they aren't smoking pot and staring blankly at the television.Justine sees an opportunity for change, however, when she meets Holden, a fellow Retail Rodeo employee who is even more depressed than herself.The young Holden and Justine soon begin a passionate secret affair, unaware that it may not be so secret after all.

programme.title: Land Of the Blind
programme.desc: A soldier recounts his relationship with a famous political prisoner attempting to overthrow their country's authoritarian government.

programme.title: Confidence: After Dark
programme.desc: What Jake Vig doesn't know just might get him killed. A sharp and polished grifter, Jake has just swindled thousands of dollars from the unsuspecting Lionel Dolby with the help of his crew: Insideman Gordo, Shills Miles, and Big Al--and two corrupt LAPD officers, Lloyd Whitworth and Omar Manzano. But when both Lionel and Big Al turn up dead, it becomes clear that Lionel wasn't just any mark--as Jake soon learns, he was an accountant for eccentric crime boss Winston King. Never one to shy away from a challenge, Jake offers to repay "The King" by pulling off the biggest con of his career. The mark? Morgan Gillette, a banker with deep ties to organized crime. With so much riding on the outcome, Jake decides to bring in a brash, blonde pickpocket named Lily, who joins the crew in a scheme involving corporate loans, creative accounting, wire transfers and off-shore accounts. Jake and his crew will have to stay one step ahead of both the criminals and the cops to finally settle their debt.

programme.title: Shoreditch
programme.desc: In London 1939, before the beginning of the Second World War, Thomas and his wife Massie run the Say When jazz club. But when he starts having an affair with singer Butterfly, their world disintegrates into blackmail, drugs, and suicide.

programme.title: The Ambassador to Bern
programme.desc: Attila Szasz's political thriller portraying the events of the hostage taking of the Hungarian ambassador to Switzerland in the aftermath of the 1956 Hungarian Revolution. The film was presented at numerous festivals all over the world. It won the Frederico Fellini Award at Tiburon International Film Festival.

programme.title: Baba
programme.desc: An weird but witty old woman is forced to deal with an ambiguous future after her country, family and the entire system of values are ruined. She is trying to solve her existential problems catching d trying to sell a rewarded war criminal as he was a rabbit in a wood. The only thing she did not know if he is really him.

programme.title: Train Master
programme.desc: 62 year old Jeremiah Wilson is truly the Train Master of Willamette Western Railroad. He lives, breaths, and eats railroad. When Brett Banner, 32 year old heir to New York Eastern talks his dad into purchasing Willamette Western, there is immediately a clash between himself and Jeremiah. Jeremiah is fired by Brett two years from retirement and turns into a angry, depressed grandfather. When Brett's nine year old son Justin realizes Jeremiah's grandson Thomas can drive a locomotive, he kidnaps and holds Thomas' favorite dinosaur ransom. Justin, Thomas and 3 other children board an old engine in for repairs and accidentally turns it into runaway engine causing a chain reaction of events.

programme.title: Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding
programme.desc: The Prince and Me 2: The Royal Wedding continues the story of 2003's fantasy romance The Prince and Me. In the earlier film, Paige (Julia Stiles) - a midwestern college co-ed - falls in love with Edvard (Luke Mably), sans realizing that he is actually the Prince of Denmark. In this sequel, Paige (now played by neophyte Kam Heskin) and Eddie must confront a centuries-old Danish edict declaring that if a Danish prince marries a commoner, he must abdicate his throne. C

programme.title: Guido Superstar: The Rise of Guido
programme.desc: An Italian immigrant is thrust into the world of drug-lords, supercars and secret agents in this hilarious action comedy. After losing his job at the Disco Valet Company for undue heroism, Guido (Silvio Pollio) must pose as a Sicilian gangster for the FBI in order to infiltrate a powerful Asian gang. Things go sour and take a turn for the worse. Guido must now make amends before he is discovered and killed, or worse, deported.

programme.title: The War Is Over
programme.desc: Following the bombardment of Kosovo in 1999, the Rahmanis and their three children emigrate to Switzerland. After years of living in their new homeland, the family faces the prospects of deportation. "No one is proud to be a refugee, but when it comes to me, I am not ashamed of who I am" says Rasim - the father of the family and an ex music teacher. Desperate to stay he invents an Albanian Dance Troupe in order to garner signatures of support from the community… The intimate narrative explores the experience of forced migration: the fraught decision to leave; the process of integration and adaptation to a new country; the impact on the family; and always, the yearning for the homeland.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The story of Barry Minkow, a young charismatic business man who becomes a wealthy CEO by lying, cheating and stealing his way to the top.

programme.title: Foolproof
programme.desc: Kevin, Samantha and Rob live for Foolproof; their own private club where through high-tech, meticulously thought out and executed plans, they pull off the most impossible of heists - all in theory that is. They've never actually done it for real. But all that changes when Leo, a cutthroat British gangster, rips off their foolproof plans for a diamond heist and uses it to successfully execute the robbery. Threatening to implicate them, Leo blackmails them to pull off a robbery worth $20 million in corporate bonds.

programme.title: Rat Race
programme.desc: Donald P. Sinclair has placed six separate gold coins in different slot machines in his casino. The lucky six who find these coins discover an opportunity of a lifetime. The chance to own $2 million. Locked up in a locker in New Mexico, these six contestants must now race each other, to be the first to the cash. There are no rules in place and everything that could possibly happen, does. Whilst, behind the scenes, Sinclair's associates are placing their bets.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: In 1968, a disastrous American advance in the Vietnam War has Lieutenant Terry Childers executing an unarmed prisoner in order to intimidate a captive Vietnam People's Army officer into calling off an ambush of United States Marine Corps. His act thereby saves the life of the wounded Lieutenant Hayes Hodges though many of Hodges' men die in the battle.

programme.title: Operation Chromite
programme.desc: In 1950, just a few months after North Korean forces have overrun most of South Korea, an American-led United Nations Command is deployed to Korea to aid the struggling South Koreans. General Douglas MacArthur devises a secret plan to attack behind enemy lines at the port city of Incheon. The risky strategy is opposed by leaders of the other military branches, forcing MacArthur to devise a clandestine operation to gather essential information from within occupied Incheon by coordinating a weeklong South Korean intelligence operation known as "X-Ray".

programme.title: She's No Angel
programme.desc: A pregnant woman fleeing a violent boyfriend, boards a train and is taken into care by a newlywed couple. The train crashes, the couple are killed and the girl is taken for the dead newlywed wife because she was wearing her ring at the time the crash happened.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: John Cusack and Samuel L Jackson star in director Tod Williams' horror, from screenplay adapted from his own novel by Stephen King. It's a normal day at Boston International Airport, with travellers on their way to and from their destinations, and airport, airline and security staff going about their business, and most of them using their mobile phones. Among them is Clay Riddell (Cusack), who's talking to his estranged wife and their young son, until his battery dies and he switches to a payphone. The inconvenience saves his life: just as his cash runs out, everyone using a mobile device around him receives an electronic pulse that causes agony and then turns them into uncontrollable ultraviolent killers. Clay narrowly escapes the mayhem and finds shelter in the paralysed subway system below the airport, where train driver Tom McCourt (Jackson) offers to lead the survivors to safety on foot. But the incident is a nationwide phenomenon, so getting out of the airport is just the start of their battle to stay alive.

programme.title: Slackers
programme.desc: Dave Goodman, Sam Schecter, and Jeff Davis are best friends who have spent almost four years at Holden University scamming their way through college. During one exam scam in their final semester Dave discovers Angela, and asks her out while writing his phone number on her exam sheet. Ethan Dulles (who calls himself "Cool Ethan"), a classmate obsessed with Angela to the extent of collecting loose hairs and making a hair doll and having surveillance photos and a shrine to Angela setup in his dorm room, takes her exam question sheet after Angela leaves and uses it to repeatedly confront and then blackmail the guys into setting up a successful date with Angela for him in exchange for his silence on the matter. The guys set Ethan up in multiple situations in an attempt to convince Angela to like him, while Dave tells Sam during their work researching her that Angela is no more important to him as any other scam they've done. Ethan fails to attract her after frequent confrontations based on his delusional behavior, immaturity and ignorance of social norms. Though Ethan seems a lonely harmless nerd, he is scheming, psychotically obsessive and hopelessly socially incompetent.

programme.title: Sacīkste
programme.desc: 20. gadsimta septiņdesmitie gadi bija sacīkšu ēras zelta laiks: vienkāršotas formas sacīkšu automašīnas, piloti – brutāli trasē, bet jūtīgi un neaizsargāti reālajā dzīvē, seksīgas fanes un litriem šampanieša aiz finiša līnijas. Taču 1976. gada "Formula 1" sezonā vēl skaļāk par motoriem rūca nežēlīga sāncensība starp pilotiem Džeimsu Hantu un Nikiju Laudu. Viņi nemeklē vieglus ceļus uz uzvaru, taču viena neuzmanība, un sacīkste var pārtraukt ne tikai viņu karjeru, bet arī dzīvību.

programme.title: Londona sauc
programme.desc: Pēcn neveiksmīga darba un bēgšanas no Apvienotās Karalistes, neizdevies slepkava spiests pieskatīt sava jaunā noziedzības līdera dēlu un parādīt viņam, kā kļūt par vīrieti.

programme.title: 127 Stundas
programme.desc: Filma "127 stundas" balstīta uz patiesiem notikumiem par alpīnistu Āronu Ralstonu, kuru filmā spēlē aktieris Džeimss Franko. Stāsts risinās pēc negadījuma Jūtas štata kanjonos, kad Āronu klinšu aizā iesprosto klintsbluķis, piespiežot viņa roku pret akmens sienu. Turpmākās piecas dienas jeb 127 stundas alpīnists cīnās par dzīvību un ir spiests pieņemt izmisīgu, taču drosmīgu lēmumu, nozāģējot savu roku, kas ir viņa vienīgā iespēja palikt dzīvam.

programme.title: Gredzenu pavēlnieks: Gredzena brālība
programme.desc: Džona Ronalda Rūela Tolkīna par kulta literatūru kļuvušo episko romānu triloģijas pirmās daļas ekranizējums. Trīspadsmit Oskara nominācijas, četras balvas! Tas ir stāsts par labā cīņu ar ļauno, par īstu draudzību un upurēšanos. Stāsts, kas tālu pārsniedz iztēles robežas... kas kļuvis par mītu, par leģendu!

programme.title: Nodevējs
programme.desc: Džonu pārņem izmisums, kad vīrietis uzzina, ka viņa pusaugu dēls nepamatoti apsūdzēts narkotiku izplatīšanā, kā rezultātā viņam draud 10 gadus ilgs cietumsods. Džons ir apņēmības pilns dēlu izglābt, tāpēc noslēdz vienošanos ar ģenerālprokuroru. Veicot misiju un iefiltrējoties narkobiznesa pasaulē, viņš riskē ne tikai ar savu, bet arī visas ģimenes drošību. Cik augstu cenu viņam nāksies maksāt, lai izpestītu dēlu no nelaimes?

programme.title: Atkal tu
programme.desc: Veiksmīga karjeras sieviete Marnija dodas uz dzimto pilsētu, uz vecākā brāļa kāzām. Liels un nepatīkams ir viņas pārsteigums, uzzinot, ka brāļa izredzētā ir Džoanna - Marnijas skolas biedrene, kura skolas laikā nejauki un pat nežēlīgi izturējās pret Marniju. Nu Marnija vēlas panākt, lai Džoanna atvainojas par skolas laiku pāri darījumiem, taču viņas māte Geila iesaka meitai atstāt savu aizvainojumu pagātnē. Mātes domas krasi mainās, kad atklājas, ka Džoannas tante ir Mona - Geilas jaunību dienu draudzene, ar kuru viņas sastrīdējās un kļuva par ienaidniecēm...

programme.title: Gredzenu pavēlnieks: Gredzena brālība

programme.title: Gredzenu pavēlnieks. Divi torņi
programme.desc: Gredzena brālība sašķēlusies trīs grupās. Gredzens ir jānes uz Mordoru, jo visvareno talismanu iespējams iznīcināt tikai šai skarbajā novadā. Divi no hobitiem - gredzena nesējs Frodo un viņa draugs Sems - apmaldās kalnos un uzduras Golumam, dīvainam radījumam, kas savulaik pats nēsājis gredzenu un kura prātiņu sašķobījusi gredzena vara. Golums piesakās pavadīt abus uz Mordoru. Frodo ir ar mieru, bet Sems jaunajam paziņam neuzticas...

programme.title: Tas neērtais moments
programme.desc: Trīs labākie draugi nonākuši situācijā, kurā esam pabijuši mēs visi - tas apjukuma pilnais moments katrās attiecībās, kurā jāizlemj, kur tas vedīs tālāk.

programme.title: Ķeceris
programme.desc: Divas jaunas misionāru meitenes klauvē pie kādas mājas durvīm. Tās atver omulīgais misters Rīds, kurš viņas aicina iekšā. Ātri vien meitenes apjēdz, ka nokļuvušas velnišķīgā slazdā un šī ir spēle uz dzīvību un nāvi.

programme.title: Teikuma beigas

programme.title: Saldas mazas lietas
programme.desc: Francijas ciematā dzīvojošs 60 gadus vecs vīrietis ar strauju temperamentu, kurš nolemj doties uz skolu, lai beidzot iemācītos lasīt un rakstīt, un aizņemts jauns skolotājs, kuram uzdots viņu izglītot.

programme.title: Apalīte
programme.desc: Vilovdīna (Pelmenīte) ir lielo izmēru modele, meita bijušaji skaistuma karalienei, pieteikusies savas mammas rīkotajā skaistumkonkursā - kā protesta akciju, kas drīz vien izvēršas plašumā un viņas pēdās seko daudzi, izmainot skaistumkonkursus un nelielo Teksasas pilsētu.

programme.title: Saldas mazas lietas
programme.desc: Francijas ciematā dzīvojošs 60 gadus vecs vīrietis ar strauju temperamentu, kurš nolemj doties uz skolu, lai beidzot iemācītos lasīt un rakstīt, un aizņemts jauns skolotājs, kuram uzdots viņu izglītot.

programme.title: Teikuma beigas
programme.desc: Pēc atbrīvošanas no cietuma jauns vīrietis negribīgi dodas ceļojumā kopā ar savu atsvešināto tēvu, lai izkaisītu mātes pelnus viņas dzimtajā Īrijā.

programme.title: Apalīte
programme.desc: Vilovdīna (Pelmenīte) ir lielo izmēru modele, meita bijušaji skaistuma karalienei, pieteikusies savas mammas rīkotajā skaistumkonkursā - kā protesta akciju, kas drīz vien izvēršas plašumā un viņas pēdās seko daudzi, izmainot skaistumkonkursus un nelielo Teksasas pilsētu.

programme.title: Saldas mazas lietas
programme.desc: Francijas ciematā dzīvojošs 60 gadus vecs vīrietis ar strauju temperamentu, kurš nolemj doties uz skolu, lai beidzot iemācītos lasīt un rakstīt, un aizņemts jauns skolotājs, kuram uzdots viņu izglītot.

programme.title: Karaliskā spēle
programme.desc: Lai izturētu Gestapo psiholoģisko teroru, nacistu ieslodzīts jurists mieru atrod šaha pasaulē.

programme.title: Pingvīnu mācības
programme.desc: Vīlies anglis, kurš 1976. gadā dodas strādāt skolā sadalītajā Argentīnā, atklāj, ka viņa dzīve mainās, kad viņš no pludmales izglābj pingvīnu bāreni.

programme.title: Ideālā Ferdinanda Čevala pils
programme.desc: Ševals ir pastnieks, kurš katru dienu ceļo pa Dromas upes apkārtni. Viņš satiek savas dzīves īsto sievieti Filomenu, un no viņu savienības piedzimst Alise. Tad viņš metas trakā azartspēlē: savām rokām uzcelt viņai neticamu pili.

programme.title: Karaliskā spēle
programme.desc: Lai izturētu Gestapo psiholoģisko teroru, nacistu ieslodzīts jurists mieru atrod šaha pasaulē.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez finds a taste of home as she tries the best Texas barbecue in Los Angeles at Moo's Craft Barbecue. Husband and wife team Andrew and Michelle Muñoz challenge Selena to create a dish that puts her own spin on their meat-centric menu. She decides to create a unique sausage containing the flavors of one her most favorite guilty pleasure foods! Selena and Raquelle quickly find themselves in over their heads as they realize that they have no idea how sausages are made. The stakes get even higher when Nana and Papa show up, two native Texans ready to see if Selena's dish can make the grade and the menu!

programme.title: Best Bite In Town
programme.desc: Guy Fieri summons Noah Cappe, Joe Sasto and Aarti Sequeira to try Japanese, Jamaican, Cuban, Greek and American favourites in Port St. Lucie, Florida!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Take one sassy former city girl, her hunky rancher husband and a band of adorable kids, an extended family, cowboys, 3000 wild mustangs, a herd of cattle and one placid basset hound and you have The Pioneer Woman. The Pioneer Woman is an open invitation into Ree Drummond's life: The award-winning blogger and best-selling cookbook author comes to Food Network and shares her special brand of home cooking, from throw-together suppers to elegant celebrations. The series, set against the incredible story of life at home on the range, is the next best thing to actually sitting on a stool in Ree's kitchen.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Take one sassy former city girl, her hunky rancher husband and a band of adorable kids, an extended family, cowboys, 3000 wild mustangs, a herd of cattle and one placid basset hound and you have The Pioneer Woman. The Pioneer Woman is an open invitation into Ree Drummond's life: The award-winning blogger and best-selling cookbook author comes to Food Network and shares her special brand of home cooking, from throw-together suppers to elegant celebrations. The series, set against the incredible story of life at home on the range, is the next best thing to actually sitting on a stool in Ree's kitchen.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Giada at Home
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis is an outstanding culinary specialist, the author of nine New York Times bestselling cookbooks, Emmy award winning television personality and the host of Giada at Home television show. Giada has quite an impressive background of culinary training from Le Cordon Bleu in Paris, which combined with her own unique Californian charm creates her one-of-a-kind recognizable style. In Giada at Home she focuses on cooking at home for friends and family for different occasions and on party planning. Holiday feast or romantic dinner, weekend vibes or average day, it does not matter- the food is always delicious.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez and Raquelle head to Alta, Chef Keith Corbin's California soul food restaurant. For the kitchen initiation, Corbin puts Selena under pressure with some short order egg cooking, and she quickly learns it's not nearly as simple as it sounds. Once she's proven her mettle, Selena attempts to make a fried fish dish tasty enough for Alta's menu and the restaurant's toughest critic, Renee Corbin.

programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: Features one competitor per episode who enters Bobby's secret kitchen to compete against professional chefs in three head-to-head rounds. If the competitor can out-cook the titans and earn more points, they take home the cash prize.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as they're pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and who'll be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Best Baker in America
programme.desc: Cooking competition show in which professional and home bakers compete in a baking tournament. For six weeks, eight skilled bakers are challenged to use their style and technical abilities to make stunning, tasty treats and impress the judges - from macarons, fruit tarts, creme brulee to spectacular and elaborately-decorated cakes. One person gets eliminated every week by the panel of judges, until the final where the best three bakers compete for the grand prize of $25,000 and the title of ''Best Baker in America''.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of ''Bizarre Foods'', focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how they're prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is whipping up fun takes on Thanksgiving classics for her Friendsgiving gathering on the farm. Her main dish is sweet and savory Pomegranate Glazed Turkey Legs, and she serves them with Slow Cooker Greens and Dumplings as well as Roasted Sweet Potato Wedges with Cilantro Yogurt. For a festive dessert, Molly bakes her super-moist Cranberry Stuffed Cupcakes with Cranberry Cream Cheese Frosting.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: American cooking competition that sees aspirational bakers producing a variety of sweet and savoury treats in the hopes of taking home the $50,000 grand prize. Join the contestants as they're pushed to their limits in a series of intense heats; each designed to showcase their culinary skills and test their ability to produce outstanding baked goods. With the competition heating up and a panel of experienced professional judges to impress, which baker will reign supreme and who'll be the first to crumble?

programme.title: Best Baker in America
programme.desc: Cooking competition show in which professional and home bakers compete in a baking tournament. For six weeks, eight skilled bakers are challenged to use their style and technical abilities to make stunning, tasty treats and impress the judges - from macarons, fruit tarts, creme brulee to spectacular and elaborately-decorated cakes. One person gets eliminated every week by the panel of judges, until the final where the best three bakers compete for the grand prize of $25,000 and the title of ''Best Baker in America''.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of ''Bizarre Foods'', focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how they're prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: Host Eric Adjepong welcomes three chefs, all specializing in the king of crustaceans, Lobster. These lobster experts from Maine, New York, and Connecticut, will take Alex on in a two round competition. The chefs will choose what type of ingredients will help them be successful in round 1, all in hopes of knocking Chef Alex out of the competition, and a chance to win $10,000. Iconic chefs, Antonia Lofaso and Esther Choi judge.

programme.title: Alex Vs America
programme.desc: In a battle for the ages, Alex Guarnaschelli must compete against her friends and fiercest rivals -- the other Iron Chefs! Host Eric Adjepong invites chefs Michael Symon, Stephanie Izard and Jose Garces to face their fellow Iron Chef in an intense and emotional two-round battle for supremacy. Then, Alex must impress more Iron Chefs as judges Simon Majumdar and Geoffrey Zakarian determine who dominates the competition.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Cupcake Championship
programme.desc: Four cupcake connoisseurs battle it out in this cooking competition series, hoping to prove they are the supreme cupcake bakers and take home the $10,000 prize. Each of these contestants are undoubtedly talented cupcake designers, but there can only be one winner, and the heat is on to showcase their artistry and flair when it comes to baking these little sweet treats. Hosted by Kardea Brown, the show give the bakers new challenges to complete in each episode, with the poorest performing contestant eliminated at each stage of the competition, resulting in a final showdown between the very best.

programme.title: Chef Grudge Match
programme.desc: Host Laila Ali challenges chefs to settle their disputes in a single round, head-to-head culinary battle. They all come here to call each other out, put their favorite knives on the line, and bury the hatchet. The winners walk out with $10,000 cash, a prized knife from the losing chef's knife roll and bragging rights for life!

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Those who care
programme.desc: Over 4,000 official volunteers and thousands of those who came at the call of their hearts: the program "Nebyduzhi" reveals the face of foreign volunteering in Ukraine. This is a story about people who exchanged foreign comfort for risky work for the sake of supporting Ukrainians. For them, help has no visas or borders, and saving lives - both military and civilian - has become the main mission.

programme.desc: Offering a deeper look at how political authority permeates everyday life, this film explores the impact of Kremlin laws on society. programme.title: Authors of War
programme.desc: Authors of War examines the powerful role writers and journalists play in shaping how conflicts are understood. Through letters, memoirs, reports and historical works, the series explores how those who documented wars helped preserve the experiences of soldiers and civilians. Each episode revisits major conflicts through the eyes of war correspondents, historians and authors whose words captured the realities of battle, the emotions of those involved and the lasting impact of war on societies and collective memory

programme.title: Cadets. Hostomel Border
programme.desc: " CADETS. GOSTOMEL BORDER " highlights the heroic participation of first-year cadets of the Zhytomyr Military Institute named after Serhiy Korolev in the defense of Kyiv in 2022. The film recreates in detail the events from February 25, when the young unit stood up to defend the strategic Gostomelskyi bridge, and until the beginning of April, while the fighters successfully held positions in the Gorenka area until the occupiers retreated. Through the prism of the memories of the cadets themselves and the high command, in particular Generals Oleksandr Syrskyi and Anatoly Bargylevych , the authors debunk the historical myth of Kruty as a "tragic self-sacrifice", instead drawing a parallel with modernity and proving that both in 1918 and in 2022, the professional actions of young people became successful operations that won the state a critically important time.

programme.title: Cadets. Hostomel Border
programme.desc: " CADETS. GOSTOMEL BORDER " highlights the heroic participation of first-year cadets of the Zhytomyr Military Institute named after Serhiy Korolev in the defense of Kyiv in 2022. The film recreates in detail the events from February 25, when the young unit stood up to defend the strategic Gostomelskyi bridge, and until the beginning of April, while the fighters successfully held positions in the Gorenka area until the occupiers retreated. Through the prism of the memories of the cadets themselves and the high command, in particular Generals Oleksandr Syrskyi and Anatoly Bargylevych , the authors debunk the historical myth of Kruty as a "tragic self-sacrifice", instead drawing a parallel with modernity and proving that both in 1918 and in 2022, the professional actions of young people became successful operations that won the state a critically important time.

programme.title: Jauns sākums
programme.desc: Greta un viņas draugs Deivs ir muzikanti un dziesmu autori, kopā jau ilgus gadus kopš koledžas laikiem. Brīdī, kad Deivs saņem piedāvājumu ierakstīt albumu no lielas ierakstu kompānijas, viņi pārvācas uz dzīvi Ņujorkā. Jauniegūtās slavas savaldzināts, Deivs pamet Gretu un uzsāk savu jauno mūziķa karjeru. Gretas dzīvē pozitīvu pavērsienu ienes nejauša satikšanās ar Denu, izbijušu ierakstu kompānijas menedžeri. Brīdī, kad Dens ierauga Gretu muzicējam nomaļā pilsētas klubā, viņu vienā mirklī apbur meitenes muzikālais talants un šarms. Līdz ar šo nejaušo sastapšanos abu dzīves ir nesaraujami saistītas, ļaujot sadziedēt brūces un sasniegt mērķus gan profesionālajā karjerā, gan privātajā dzīvē. Jauns dzīves sākums izstāstīts uz Ņujorkas vasaras fona.

programme.title: Balerīna
programme.desc: Slepkava, apmācīta Ruska Roma organizācijas tradīcijās, dodas atriebt tēva nāvi.

programme.title: Didi
programme.desc: 2008. gadā, pēdējā vasaras mēnesī pirms vidusskolas sākuma, 13 gadus vecs zēns iemācās to, ko viņa ģimene nevar viņam iemācīt: kā slidot, kā flirtēt un kā mīlēt savu mammu.

programme.title: Motobraucēji
programme.desc: Pēc nejaušas tikšanās pārgalvīgo Ketiju piesaista Benijs, Vidusrietumu motokluba "Vandals" biedrs. Klubam pārtopot par bīstamu vardarbības perēkli, Benijam ir jāizvēlas starp Ketiju un viņa lojalitāti klubam.

programme.title: Tintina piedzīvojumi: Vienradža noslēpums
programme.desc: Stīvena Spīlberga triloģijas pirmā filma par slaveno Tintinu, zēnu - reportieri.

programme.title: Čārlija eņģeļi
programme.desc: Noslēpumainā Čārlza Taunsenda detektīvaģentūra atvērusi birojus visā pasaulē. Tās paspārnē vairāku Bosliju vadībā izveidotas Eņģeļu komandas, kurās darbojas visgudrākās, visdrosmīgākās un visaugstāk kvalificētās sievietes, kam jātiek galā ar vissarežģītākajiem uzdevumiem jebkur uz zemeslodes.

programme.title: Viesnīca Transilvānija
programme.desc: Laipni lūgti viesnīcā "Transilvānija", Drakulas krāšņajā pieczobu kūrortā, kurā monstri var izbaudīt nesteidzīgu atpūtu. Ir pienākusi īpaša nedēļas nogale, kuras laikā Drakula ir ielūdzis ciemos dažus no saviem labākajiem draugiem. Ir plānots svinēt Drakulas meitas Meivisas pilngadību – 118. dzimšanas dienu. Uzņemt tik kuplu viesu pulku Drakulas ģimenei nav problēma. Tomēr jukas izceļas, kad viesnīcā ieklīst parasts puisis un ieskatās viņa meitā.

programme.title: Viesnīca Transilvānija
programme.desc: Slavenajā viesnīcā "Transilvānija", kura pieder labsirdīgajam vampīram Drakulam, viss it kā iet uz augšu - tagad to var apmeklēt arī cilvēki! Taču Draks noraizējies par to, ka viņa apburošajā mazdēliņā Denijā - pa pusei cilvēkā, pa pusei vampīrā _, ir daudz vairāk no cilvēka nekā no vampīra. Tāpēc viņš dod savai monstru komandai pavēli izmācīt puiku kā vien vajag, lai viņš kļūtu par īstu vampīru!

programme.title: Kentervilas spoks
programme.desc: Sera Saimona de Kentervila rēgs jau 300 gadus klīst pa savrupmāju, meklēdams drosmīgu pēcnācēju, kurš viņu varētu atbrīvot no lāsta. Kad šajā savrupmājā ievācas kāda amerikāņu ģimene, spokam parādās cerību stariņš beidzot tapt atbrīvotam.

programme.title: Terra Villijs - planēta nezināmais
programme.desc: Kad kosmosa kuģis cieš avāriju un Villijs tiek nošķirts no saviem vecākiem, viņš nokļūst uz mežonīgas un neizpētītas planētas, kur ar izdzīvošanas robota Baka palīdzību būs jānoturas, līdz ieradīsies glābšanas komanda.

programme.title: Viesnīca Transilvānija 3: Mošķu brīvdienas
programme.desc: Monstru ģimene šoreiz dodas brīvdienās. Luksusa kruīza kuģis aizvedīs Drakulu prom no rūpēm par viesnīcas apmeklētāju labsajūtu. Un kas ir atpūta bez draugiem, kuri tāpat ar prieku metas baudīt kuģa sniegtās izklaides! Taču, kad Drakula iemīlas noslēpumainajā kapteinē Ērikā, viņš vēl nenojauš, ka Ērika ir monstru lielākā ienaidnieka Ābrahama van Helsinga pēctece un sākas mošķu cienīga drāma.

programme.title: Zirnekļcilvēks: Tālu no mājām
programme.desc: Pīters Pārkers joprojām sēro par sava mentora Tonija Starka zaudējumu un cenšas atgriezties parasta pusaudža dzīvē. Viņš kopā ar klasesbiedriem dodas skolas ekskursijā uz Eiropu, cerot uz laiku nolikt malā supervaroņa kostīmu, izbaudīt Venēciju, Parīzi un Londonu, un beidzot atzīties mīlestībā Emdžejai. Tomēr Pītera plāni sabrūk, kad viņu uzmeklē Niks Furijs. Eiropas pilsētām uzbrūk noslēpumaini radījumi Elementāļi, kas spēj izsaukt dabas katastrofas. Pīteram nākas apvienot spēkus ar jaunu sabiedroto no paralēlās dimensijas Kventinu Beku, kuru pasaule iepazīst kā Misterio. Pīteram ir jāizlemj, vai viņš ir gatavs kļūt par nākamo "Dzelzs vīru" pasaulē, kas ir neatgriezeniski mainījusies, un jāmācās atšķirt patiesību no ilūzijas.

programme.title: Zirnekļcilvēks: Atgriešanās mājās
programme.desc: Sajūsmināts par pavadīto laiku kopā ar Atriebējiem, Pīters Pārkers ir atgriezies mājās, kur dzīvo kopā ar tanti Meju sava jaunā mentora Tonija Stārka uzraudzībā. Viņš cenšas dzīvot vienkāršu pusaudža dzīvi, tomēr nespēj nedomāt par to, ka varētu būt sabiedrībai noderīgs ar savām supervaroņa spējām. Kad pie apvāršņa parādās ļaundaris, viņam būs iespēja tās likt lietā!

programme.title: Baltais zilonis
programme.desc: Bijušais jūras kājinieks Gabriels spiests cīnīties ar savu sirdsapziņu un pārkāpt goda kodeksu, jo viņam jāstrādā mafijas labā. Gabriels izpilda mafijas bosa pavēles, taču, kad viņam ir jālikvidē policiste, emocionālā spriedze sasniedz lūzuma punktu.

programme.title: Blefotājs
programme.desc: Ekscentrisks miljardieris Džeiks uzaicina vecos draugus uz riskantu pokera spēli, kurā likmes ir tik augstas kā vēl nekad. Taču svešinieku iebrukums izmaina vakara gaitu - tagad uz spēles ir liktas arī klātesošo dzīvības.

programme.title: Advokāts
programme.desc: Veiksmīgais advokāts ir sasniedzis savas karjeras augstāko punktu un atradis liktenīgo sievieti, ar kuru vēlas drīz precēties. Viņa mierīgo dzīvi iztraucē senas paziņas lūgums. Piekrītot šim piedāvājumam, advokātam nāksies pieņemt lēmumus, kas neatbilst viņa principiem un morāles normām. Viņš vēl nemaz nenojauš, ka, iesaistoties amorālajā narkobiznesā, viņa dzīve izmainīsies līdz nepazīšanai. Filmā piedalās krāšņs aktieru ansamblis - Maikls Fasbenders, Penelope Krusa, Kemerone Diasa, Havjers Bardems un Breds Pits.

programme.title: Ilgas
programme.desc: Ričards Gīrs atveido biznesa magnātu, kurš sastop savu seno mazpilsētas draudzeni, kura ieradusies lielpilsētā. Vārds pa vārda un viņš uzzina, ka viņiem ir kopīgs bērns, par kuru viņš neko nezināja.

programme.title: Džūlzs
programme.desc: Jo vecāks Miltons kļūst, jo dīvaināks viņš apkārtējiem šķiet. Ne gluži bīstams vai atbaidošs - taču pietiekami neparasts, lai pilsētiņas iedzīvotāji viņu neutvertu nopietni. Tāpēc neviens, izņemot kaimiņienes Sendiju un Džoisu, Miltonam netic, kad viņš uzstāj, ka viņa dārzā avarējis NLO. Taču stāsts ir patiess, un citplanētiešu kuģa pilots, vārdā Džūlss, pārceļas pie viņa uz dzīvi. Taču valdībai attiecībā uz Džūlsu ir citi plāni...

programme.title: Pusotrs spiegs
programme.desc: Kelvins Džoiners (Kevins Hārts) skolas laikā bija populārais puisis. Divdesmit gadus vēlāk viņš ir veiksmīgs grāmatvedis, kuru pārsteidz ziņa no Boba Stouna. Izrādās, ka patiesībā viņš ir Robijs Vīrdikts (Dveins Džonsons) – apsmietais tīnis viņa skolā. Bobs ir trenējies divdesmit gadus un šobrīd ir izcils CIP aģents. Viņš algo Kelvinu, lai ar viņa grāmatvedības prasmju palīdzību izsekotu ierīci, kura ASV spiegošanas jomā var radīt jucekli. Dīvainais pāris sastopas ar pārspēku, taču viņiem sanāk arī daži varoņdarbi.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Ir pagājis labs laiks kopš Ziemassvētkiem, kad Makkalisteru ģimene, dodoties brīvdienās, pirmo reizi aizmirsa mājās Kevinu. Šos Ziemassvētkus Kevins nolēmis pavadīt sava tēta bagātās draudzenes Natālijas milzīgajā savrupmājā. Taču mierīgais vakars viņam kārtējo reizi izvēršas par īstu piedzīvojumu, jo Natālijas māju svētkos nolēmuši apciemot zagļi. Starp citu - vienam no viņiem ar Kevinu ir kārtojami veci rēķini!

programme.title: Grāmatu zagle
programme.desc: Filma "Grāmatu zagle", kuras pamatā ir pasaulē populārs romāns, ir stāsts par neparastu, enerģisku meiteni, kuru Otrā pasaules kara laikā Vācijā nosūta dzīvot audžuģimenē. Meiteni ieintriģē vienīgā grāmata, ko viņa paņēmusi līdzi, tāpēc viņa sāk kolekcionēt grāmatas. Ar savu jauno vecāku un zem kāpnēm mītošā slepenā viesa palīdzību meitene iemācās lasīt un izveido brīnumainu pasauli, kas iedvesmo viņus visus.

programme.title: Smurfi
programme.desc: Laipni lūdzam smurfu pasaulē! Burvis Gargamels ir piespiedis smurfus bēgt no dzimtā ciema. Ģimenes komēdija, kurā animācijas filmas varoņi parādās spēlfilmā.

programme.title: Zirnekļcilvēks: Pāri Zirnekļpasaulei
programme.desc: Mailss Moraless atgriežas uz ekrāniem nākamajā ar Oskaru apbalvotās Zirnekļpasaules sāgas nodaļā. Varenais piedzīvojums nogādās Zirnekļcilvēku no Bruklinas draudzīgās apkaimes pāri Zirnekļpasaulei, lai viņš apvienotu spēkus ar Gvenu Steisiju un jauno zirnekļļaužu komandu un stātos pretī ļaundarim, par kuru spēcīgāku viņi vēl nav satikuši.

programme.title: Karš par Pērtiķu planētu
programme.desc: Pērtiķu līderis Cēzars saskaras ar personīgu pārbaudījumu, jo viņam uzbrukušie cilvēku karavīri, kurus vada cietsirdīgais Pulkvedis, nogalina viņa tuviniekus. Cēzars ar savu inteliģento pērtiķu armiju stājas pretim cilvēkiem, kuri iznīcina viņu ģimenes. Ar primitīviem ieročiem bruņotās abu sugu armijas tiksies cīņā, kuras laikā tiks izlemts, kura suga kontrolēs Zemi nākotnē.

programme.title: Apbrīnojamais Zirnekļcilvēks
programme.desc: Stāsts par Pīteru Pārkeru, vienaudžu izstumtu vidusskolnieku, ko pametuši vecāki un uzaudzinājuši tēvocis Bens un tante Meja. Pīters cenšas atrast savu vietu dzīvē un rast iespēju būt kopā ar savu pirmo skolas mīlestību Gvenu. Kad Pīters atrod noslēpumainu koferi, kas piederējis viņa tēvam, viņš sāk saprast savu vecāku pazušanas iemeslus un nonāk uz pēdām doktoram Kurtam Konorsam, kas ir viņa tēva bijušais biznesa partneris. Drīz vien Pīteram nākas pieņemt izšķirošus lēmumus un likt lietā savu spēku un spējas, lai kļūtu par to, ko viņam lēmis liktenis - par varoni.

programme.title: Brutālists
programme.desc: Bēgdams no pēckara Eiropas, arhitekts Lāslo Tots ierodas Amerikā, lai sāktu jaunu dzīvi, atrastu darbu un gaidītu sievu Eržēbeti, kura cenšas izkļūt no Austrumeiropas. Svešajā un jaunajā valstī Lāslo apmetas Filadelfijā, kur bagātais un ietekmīgais rūpnieks Harisons Lī Van Būrens pamana viņa talantu. Lāslo ir jāatrod savs ceļš jaunajā pasaulē, kurā valda citi noteikumi. Amerikāņu sapnis šķiet iluzors, panākumi un slava maksā lielu cenu…

programme.title: Alarum
programme.desc: Silvestrs Stallone – spiegu trillerī. Precēts spiegu pāris slēpjas no varas iestādēm, kas meklē pazudušu cieto disku.

programme.title: Alkatīgie cilvēki
programme.desc: Nelielā salas pilsētā tās iedzīvotājiem jātiek galā ar sensacionālu slepkavību un nejauši atrastiem miljons dolāriem. Pieņemdama aizvien vairāk nepareizu lēmumu, reiz miermīlīgā pilsētiņas sabiedrība mainās līdz nepazīšanai.

programme.title: Pēdējais elpas vilciens
programme.desc: Patiess stāsts par dziļjūras nirējiem, kas cīnās, lai izglābtu savu komandas biedru, iesprostotu desmitiem metru zem okeāna virsmas.

programme.title: Futbols: Serie A. Genoa - Milan

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Barcelona - Real Betis
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Futbols: Serie A. Inter - Verona
programme.desc: Coverage of Italy's top-flight football league.

programme.title: Futbols: Bundesliga. Bayern - Koln
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the week's action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Real Oviedo - Alaves
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. programme.title: Futbols: Ligue 1. Marseille - Rennes
programme.desc: PSG, AS Monaco, Marseille, Olympique Lyonnais & Lille... just to name a few. Ligue 1 is currently full of well-organised football teams and incredible European talent, who are a complement to the sport. As the highest professional division in France, it has established itself as one of the top five leagues on the continent. Lyon are the most successful team in regards to consecutive titles, whereas PSG and AS Monaco have managed to propel themselves to the highest achievements in the league, with calculated foreign investment. With the latter coming from a principality, Ligue 1 is another example of a domestic league that provides cross-border competition. From southern wine-growing regions such as Bordeaux, to the historically renowned capital of Paris, we cover the whole of France.

programme.title: Basketbols: Eirolīga. 1/2 fināls. Olympiacos - Fenerbahce
programme.desc: The EuroLeague is the top-tier European professional basketball club competition since 2000. The competition replaced the FIBA EuroLeague (which was previously called the FIBA European Champions Cup, or simply the European Cup), which had been run by FIBA since 1958. Starting from 2010/2011 season the tournament is named Turkish Airlines Euroleague, due to a sponsorship contract of Turkish Airlines with EuroLeague, and in 2013 the contract was prolonged to 2020. The tournament is aired in 199 countries of the world. The current EuroLeague structure is made up of 16 teams, which each play each other twice, once at home and once away, in a double round robin league regular season, each team plays 30 games. The top 8 placed teams at the end of the regular season advance to playoffs, each plays a 5 game playoff series against a single opponent. The winners of each playoff series advance to the Final Four held in a predetermined city for two days. The Final Four features two semifinals, a third place game, and the championship game, all on the same weekend.

programme.desc: After a dishwasher disaster, these realtors decide to revamp their dated Washington home in a whimsical cottage style on a tight budget.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: Windy City Rehab is a reality renovation show hosted by interior designer Alison Victoria. She and her expert team buy and restore old homes in her beloved Chicago historic neighborhoods. It is much more than a simple improvement of a house. Alison and her team are rescuing vintage houses and hold true to the original style and architecture as much as possible. They do their best to pay tribute to the historic roots, while integrating some modern makeovers.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: The seven-episode series follows Carmine, a real estate agent and interior designer, and Mike, a landscape designer, as they each pitch their design plans to clients. The budget is set, so the guys must be persuasive to score a bigger chunk of the dollars to either max out the interiors or make the most of the outdoor spruce up.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: As their daughters get older, Georgia residents Lisa and Kevin are looking for a change of pace from their busy lives. They're looking for a home in Hilton Head, SC, that their kids will always want to return to.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple is leaving the mountains and cold of Boone, NC, behind for a new job in sunny Key West, FL. They're excited to embrace eclectic charm of the island, but they will have to chose between character and convenience.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families' dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you don't have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfront's in USA, looking for homes that won't break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tarek's picture-perfect wife, who Tarek's friends still can't believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, we'll follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A career-driven couple is looking to make the leap from Greenwich, Connecticut, to their island fantasy destination of East Hampton, New York, where they can finally enjoy the fruits of their labor and live their island life.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: Reality series showing American house hunters who are considering joining the tiny-house revolution where people are choosing to live in smaller homes - often less than 55 square metres -and praising their benefits. In this property series realtors present three petite houses to prospective buyers. Some of the homes would be used as permanent residences whilst others could be a retreat to escape to. There are various reasons for the trend for tiny-living; some people are doing it for financial reasons, others are trying to live more ecologically and some yearn for a simpler lifestyle. When the potential tiny-homeowners are faced with the practical limitations of the properties on offer will they take the plunge and embrace the joys of tiny living? Or will they change their minds for more spacious accommodation?

There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. This American reality series follows prospective homebuyers as they venture into this Central American paradise to find their dream property, with the help of expert realtors. Whatever their reasons for moving; sun, sand, surf or simply a change of scenery, the realtors aid the buyers every step of the way, helping them to locate ideal properties that they can either move into or enjoy as a holiday home. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.desc: A single mom wants to trade the New Jersey traffic for a bike commute on Key West. She's hoping to find a turnkey home with a big backyard, while her six-year-old's wish list includes a pool, a beach and boat.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: After years of vacationing on Topsail Island, NC, an NYC family is ready to start living the island life full-time. The calm and relaxing beaches are a breath of fresh air, and flexible careers are making this dream a reality.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families' dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you don't have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfront's in USA, looking for homes that won't break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tarek's picture-perfect wife, who Tarek's friends still can't believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, we'll follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A Boston accountant wants to escape the hectic city life by finding a beach getaway. He grew up visiting Aquidneck Island, RI, and now he wants to find a bachelor pad near the water and downtown Newport where he can relax.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: Windy City Rehab is a reality renovation show hosted by interior designer Alison Victoria. She and her expert team buy and restore old homes in her beloved Chicago historic neighborhoods. It is much more than a simple improvement of a house. Alison and her team are rescuing vintage houses and hold true to the original style and architecture as much as possible. They do their best to pay tribute to the historic roots, while integrating some modern makeovers.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: The seven-episode series follows Carmine, a real estate agent and interior designer, and Mike, a landscape designer, as they each pitch their design plans to clients. The budget is set, so the guys must be persuasive to score a bigger chunk of the dollars to either max out the interiors or make the most of the outdoor spruce up.

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. This American reality series follows prospective homebuyers as they venture into this Central American paradise to find their dream property, with the help of expert realtors. Whatever their reasons for moving; sun, sand, surf or simply a change of scenery, the realtors aid the buyers every step of the way, helping them to locate ideal properties that they can either move into or enjoy as a holiday home. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: Home renovation expert and social media creator Jenn Todryk tears down the notion that major demolition is always necessary to create whole-home transformations. She combines clever design solutions and cost-saving ideas to create stunning home overhauls for clients in the Dallas-Fort Worth area—often without removing walls or tackling large-scale demo.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: Now that their kids are older, a family is moving back to their roots in Arkansas. Dave and Jenny step in to help turn their large country home with lots of acreage into a cozy farmhouse where they can focus on "unplugging" with more family time together.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: Two newlyweds from Chicago love the house they bought in Arkansas, but they want to put their own personalized stamp on it. Jenny and Dave use the couple's Napa wedding as inspiration to turn the drab brick rancher into a dazzling first home to remember.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation
programme.desc: Finding the perfect home is never easy, but these aspirational house hunters don't plan on making it any easier for themselves. Meet the budding designers, builders and decorators determined to start from scratch and take on the mega projects all for themselves. Each episode features a new group of hopefuls looking to find cheap run-down houses with the aim of rapidly transforming them into their dream family homes. As families and friends embark on their mission to construct their future homes, follow their progress as they encounter all of excitement, stress and chaos that comes with home renovation.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, they're keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erin's imaginative hand sketches to Ben's custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small town's future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Izzy Does It
programme.desc: The series will follow Izzy and his family as they work together to develop their home renovation and design business in Santa Ana, California — Izzy's hometown. By the end of each hour-long episode, Izzy will deliver dazzling renovation results to clients with realistic budgets in the area.

programme.title: The Renovator
programme.desc: Marcus uses design to help a couple with three kids who are at a breaking point with both their cramped house and marriage.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: After only nine months of dating, a Canadian power couple is ready to find a love nest and build a business in Tulum, Mexico.

programme.title: Tropic Like It's Hot
programme.desc: After a DM slide and just one week together, a Canadian is selling everything to relocate and reignite a romance in Jacó, Costa Rica.

programme.title: The Renovator
programme.desc: Marcus Lemonis helps a family whose home near the beach is causing them health issues. He helps bring harmony to this struggling family.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple wants to leave the isolated island of Nantucket for tropical Merritt Island, Florida, so they can escape long winters and spend more time outdoors. They seek a home with an open concept and a bonus room for his man cave.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Empty nesters who have been visiting Topsail Island, North Carolina, for more than 20 years are ready to relocate permanently. Their hometown is becoming congested, so it's the perfect time to make the move to an oceanfront condo.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple with construction experience wants a fixer upper on Fidalgo Island, WA. They're ready to trade long commutes in Seattle for a more active lifestyle on the island, where they can enjoy the view and hiking trails.
